notes: Source: docs/ghl-reference/dispobuddy/dispobuddy-opportunities.csv. Stage advancement is driven by partner-stage-notify.js which fires on the GHL 'Opportunity Stage Changed' workflow trigger. The first stage is auto-created by dispo-buddy-submit.js; subsequent stages are operator-driven in GHL UI.

stages.name: New JV Lead
stages.trigger_event: dispo-buddy-submit creates opportunity here on every submission

stages.name: JV Agreement Sent
stages.trigger_event: Operator advances after sending JV terms

stages.name: JV Agreement Signed
stages.trigger_event: Operator advances after PA executed (or e-sign webhook)

stages.name: Actively Marketing
stages.trigger_event: Operator advances after deal listed on TFS marketplace

stages.name: Assignment Sent
stages.trigger_event: Operator advances after sending buyer contract
